title: Cake Cutting Set for Wedding, Personalized Gold Cake Knife and Server Set, Custom Cake Serving Set, Engraved Pastry Pie Server Cake Pizza Cutter, Christmas Birthday Bridal Gift (Classic)
features: 🍰【A PRECIOUS KEEPSAKE】The atmosphere of a wedding will be pushed to the climax when the couple cut the cake together. Impress your guest with this beautiful, exquisite, shiny and customized cake knife and server set. It will be a treasured keepsake after the big day!

🍰【ELEGANT DESIGN】Featuring a sharp blade, a stunning finish, a long reach, and an ergonomic, vintage handle, the gold cake cutting set not only easily slices and servers cake, pie or pizza, it also adds some elegance and romance to your wedding or party.

🍰【EXCEPTIONAL GIFT】With a beautiful, customized engraving, the cake server set is such a thoughtful, creative gift that everyone loves! The cake cutter set also makes a lovely gift for celebrating birthdays, Valentine's Day, anniversaries, housewarming or holiday parties.

🍰【WIDELY APPLICATION】The cake knife set is made of premium one-piece zinc alloy, which is durable, safe to use and stands the test of time. The cake knife and server both have suitable sizes. Beside of cutting a wedding cake, the server set is perfect for serving cake, pie, crepe or any other dessert.

🍰【PERSONALIZED ENGRAVING】We provide the wedding cake knife and server set in a variety of custom-engraved designs. Choose one you like! If you have your own design, I’d like to customize it for you. Click 'Customize Now' to begin designing your cake cutting set.
description: Product Description TUKDAK Personalized Cake Knife and Server Set Customized Cake Knife and Server Set The big day deserves an elegant and original cake cutting set! It is a commemorative keepsake expressing your love and commitment to one another. Sharp Blade Both cake knife and server are made of high-quality food grade material, which is anti-rust, high-end, and stunning. The knife can cut through layers of cake, pie, pizza easily, and the server helps to share with everyone. Aesthetic Handles The handles of cake server set feature a vintage luxurious style. Gold handles are decorated with various patterns, looking elegant and beautiful. Also, the cake server and knife are comfortable and secure to grip. Personalized Engraving Your special moment deserves an unique cake cutting set. Come and customize your own cake server and knife set! We are now offering the wedding cake knife and server set in a variety of custom-engraved designs. Packaged as a Gift The cake serving set is packed in a durable box to protect it from broken and scratching. It is a nice, gift-ready package. What a great gift for wedding, anniversary, birthday or holiday gift! Get More Creative If there are other Designs or Patterns you want to engrave, please provide us with your picture, we are happy to make it for you. Color: Gold Personalized cake cutting set Material: premium one-piece zinc alloy Package: 1* knife and 1* server How to Customize Your Cake Knife and Cake Server？ Step 1: Choose your favorite personalized design. Step 2: Click the "Customize Now" button to enter the customization page. Step 3: Provide the bride’s name, groom’s name and the wedding date on the customized page. If you choose “no engraving” on the first step, please ignore this page. Step 4: Your cake cutter set is ready to be engraved. Why Choose Us？ Laser-engraving Various choices Unique handle Cake Cutting Set Pizza/Pie Server Dessert knife/Server Bread Knife If you are looking for a thoughtful, creative gift, nothing can be a better idea than an unique, engraved gold cake knife & server set. It also makes a lovely gift for celebrating birthdays, Valentine's Day, anniversaries, housewarming or holiday parties.
